name: PERIODONTAL DISEASE
dominant_finding: rimlike enhancement of fluid collection (abscess), cellulitis, myositis
distribution: cortical dehiscence commonly on lingual aspect of mandible
discriminating_features: rimlike enhancement of fluid collection (abscess), cellulitis, myositis
cortical dehiscence commonly on lingual aspect of mandible
permeative bone changes, osseous destruction, periosteal reaction

CT: rimlike enhancement of fluid collection (abscess), cellulitis, myositis
cortical dehiscence commonly on lingual aspect of mandible
permeative bone changes, osseous destruction, periosteal reaction

clinical.Rx: tooth extraction, abscess drainage, IV antibiotics
